default_body.markdown:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Updates:
- [GP#1283](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1283): Synced translations from [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- [GP#1231](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1231): Save selected target download platform when downloading resources (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1247](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1247): Custom home page - Added share_game_log event (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1247](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1247): Custom home page - Added server parameter to launch_game event (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1247](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1247): Custom home page - Added random text block component (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1254](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1254): Added toolbar to log output: Clear, Auto-scroll, Scroll to bottom (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1255](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1255): Added device Vulkan check to detect whether MC 26.2+ can be launched (by @MovTery)
  - **Tested by**: @ConfectionaryQwQ, @Vera-Firefly, and other helpful community members
- [GP#1277](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1277): Added ability to open quick menu by long-pressing the version list in the main menu (by @MovTery)

## Refactors:
- [GP#1246](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1246): Separated game log sharing logic into its own handler (by @MovTery)

## Fixes:
- [GP#1244](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1244): Deduplicate game dependency libraries when launching and added logging (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1245](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1245): Release active component on pointer up in control layout & pointer capture logic (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1247](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1247): Custom home page - Improved security of home page events (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1252](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1252): Multi-touch conflict on scrollable controls in control layout (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1263](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1263): MC 26.2+ failing to fall back to OpenGL when Vulkan requirements are not met (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1263](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1263): MC 26.2+ crashing when running in picture-in-picture mode (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1264](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1264): Error handling coroutine not using main thread dispatcher in account management (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1281](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1281): Do not use user-defined parameters when installing a loader from the foreground (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1282](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1282): Control layout pointer handling conflict on some devices (only pointer slide) (by @MovTery)

bodies.markdown:
## 提示：
- 26.2+ Mojang 引入了 Vulkan 渲染引擎，若您的设备不支持 **Vulkan 1.2**，请勿使用 **Vulkan 后端**启动 Minecraft 最新版本


## 更新：
- [GP#1283](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1283)：同步 [Weblate 项目](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/) 语言
- [GP#1231](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1231)：下载资源时，保存已选定的目标搜索平台 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1247](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1247)：自定义主页 - 新增 share_game_log 事件 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1247](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1247)：自定义主页 - launch_game 事件新增 server 参数 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1247](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1247)：自定义主页 - 新增随机文本块组件 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1254](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1254)：日志输出新增工具栏：清除、自动滚动、滚动到底部 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1255](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1255)：添加设备 Vulkan 检查功能，检测能否启动 MC 26.2+ (by @MovTery)
  - **测试**：@ConfectionaryQwQ、@Vera-Firefly，以及各位热心群友
- [GP#1277](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1277)：主菜单内，可通过长按版本列表打开快捷菜单 (by @MovTery)


## 重构：
- [GP#1246](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1246)：单独处理游戏日志分享逻辑 (by @MovTery)


## 修复：
- [GP#1244](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1244)：启动游戏时，对游戏依赖库进行去重 & 增加日志记录 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1245](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1245)：控制布局中，指针抬起时释放活跃组件 & 指针占用逻辑 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1247](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1247)：自定义主页 - 提升主页事件安全性 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1252](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1252)：控制布局可滑动控件多指触控冲突 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1263](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1263)：MC 26.2+ 不满足 Vulkan 使用条件时，无法回落 OpenGL (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1263](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1263)：MC 26.2+ 使用小窗运行游戏崩溃 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1264](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1264)：账号管理中，错误处理协程未使用主线程分发器 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1281](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1281)：前台安装加载器时，不再使用用户自定义的参数 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1282](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1282)：部分设备上，控制布局仅滑动指针处理冲突的问题 (by @MovTery)
